title: Staging database field-level encryption waiver
description: Staging database does not use field-level encryption. Contains only synthetic test data generated by Faker library. No real PII.
compensating_controls: No real data in staging - verified monthly by automated data scan; staging VPC isolated from production; staging access restricted to engineering team; quarterly synthetic data verification report

title: Report cache JSONB column unencrypted at field level
description: Report cache stores pre-computed aggregated analytics (counts, averages, percentages). No PII - data is aggregated beyond individual identification. Field-level encryption not applicable.
compensating_controls: Data is aggregated/anonymized (k-anonymity k>50); no PII fields present; report generation pipeline verified to exclude PII; RDS encryption provides at-rest protection; quarterly content audit by Data Governance
